title: File not writable error in Read/Write Files node
symptom: When using the 'Read/Write Files from Disk' node, an error states that the file '/data/file.log' is not writable. This prevents the workflow from executing successfully.
applies_when: Using Read/Write Files from Disk node
root_cause: The error occurs because the n8n instance is restricted from accessing the specified file path due to the configuration of the N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO environment variable. When multiple paths are set, it can lead to unexpected behavior and access issues.
fix_steps: Change the file path in the node to '/data/shared/file.log' or the full path.
If that doesn't work, modify the N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO variable to only include one path, such as '/backup'.
agent_instruction: Update the file path in the Read/Write Files node and adjust the N8N_RESTRICT_FILE_ACCESS_TO variable.
